acceptance_conditions.label: all source, patch, build, binary, input, target, protocol, and R164 bindings remain exact
three post-registration process artifacts retain 256 candidate-traced calls
all calls import the hash-bound R165 accelerator binary under the frozen environment
every complete yielded candidate retains index, mapping, source score, and leaf evidence
source candidate selection reproduces the returned mapping and score on every call
the four policy replays use the frozen first-seen replacement and tie rules
candidate-level differences are reported without claiming an alternate search path
zero simulations, shots, sampling, route changes, and hidden seeds are recorded
the frozen R157 input, target, source lineage, and R164 boundary remain bound
forbidden bug, hardware, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: candidate-level replay over complete candidates yielded by the frozen VF2 iterator
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: an alternate search path, a production remedy, a confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-platform determinism, hardware performance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
